chunks.text: Song Mei | EECS at UC Berkeley Song Mei: Faculty Home Page Song Mei Below The Line Assistant Professor Contact Information 387 Evans Hall songmei@berkeley.edu Links Personal Homepage Research Support Eva Leach eva.leach@berkeley.edu Education 2020, PhD, Computational and Mathematical Engineering, Stanford University 2014, BS, Mathematics, Peking University Research Areas Artificial Intelligence (AI) Signal Processing (SP) Theory (THY) Control, Intelligent Systems, and Robotics (CIR) Information, Data, Network, and Communication Sciences (IDNCS) Research Centers Berkeley Artificial Intelligence Research Lab (BAIR) Berkeley Laboratory for Information and System Sciences (BLISS) Center for the Theoretical Foundations of Learning, Inference, Information, Intelligence, Mathematics and Microeconomics at Berkeley (CLIMB) Selected Honors and Awards Sloan Research Fellow , 2025 Okawa Research Grant , 2024 NSF Faculty Early Career Development Award (CAREER) , 2024 Amazon Research Award , 2024 Google Faculty Research Award , 2024
